claimText: LSE research guidance applies to LSE staff and students undertaking research and frames generative AI as a supportive tool while keeping researchers accountable for outputs.

citation.citationTitle: LSE Guidance on the use of Generative AI for research
citation.publisher: The London School of Economics and Political Science
